questions.question: What New Mexico town has a radio station appropriately named KBOM?
What attorney said Jeremy Irons made a better Claus von Bulow than von Bulow himself?
What Latin leader did U.S. forces loudly serenade with I Fought the Law and Nowhere to Hide to encourage his surrender?
Who became the first golfer from Fiji to win a major tournament, in 1998?
What basketball team had drubbed the New Jersey Reds 2,495 straight times before losing to them 100-99 in 1971?
